components.name: Button
components.description: Primary interactive element for triggering actions. Supports gradient primary, ghost, danger, and success styles with optional loading and icon slots.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the button

props.name: size
props.description: Height and font size of the button

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows a spinner and disables interaction

props.name: iconLeft
props.description: Icon rendered to the left of the label

props.name: iconRight
props.description: Icon rendered to the right of the label

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches button to fill container width

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables button interaction

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler

components.name: Input
components.description: Text input field with optional label, hint, error message, icons, and left/right addons. Uses React.forwardRef.

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the input

props.name: hint
props.description: Helper text shown below the input when no error

props.name: error
props.description: Error message that replaces the hint and applies error styling

props.name: size
props.description: Height and font size of the input

props.name: iconLeft
props.description: Icon rendered inside the left edge of the input

props.name: iconRight
props.description: Icon rendered inside the right edge of the input

props.name: addonLeft
props.description: Static text prefix attached to the left of the input (e.g. 'https://')

props.name: addonRight
props.description: Static text suffix attached to the right of the input

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretches input wrapper to fill container

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the input

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text

examples: <Input label="Email" placeholder="you@example.com" hint="We'll never share it" />

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact label for status, category, or count. Supports semantic color variants and an optional leading dot indicator.

props.name: variant
props.description: Color scheme of the badge

props.name: size
props.description: Height and font size of the badge

props.name: dot
props.description: Shows a small colored circle before the label

props.name: children
props.description: Badge label content

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface container for grouping related content. Supports variants, padding control, and interactive (clickable) mode. Includes CardHeader, CardBody, and CardFooter sub-components.

props.name: variant
props.description: Background and shadow style of the card

props.name: interactive
props.description: Adds hover lift effect and cursor pointer for clickable cards

props.name: padding
props.description: Internal padding of the card

props.name: onClick
props.description: Click handler for interactive cards

props.name: children
props.description: Card content

components.name: Text
components.description: Typography component that maps semantic variants (display, h1–h5, body, caption, overline, mono) to correct HTML tags with design system font styles. Supports gradient text.

props.name: variant
props.description: Typography scale variant — controls size, weight, and line-height

props.name: color
props.description: Semantic text color token

props.name: as
props.description: Override the rendered HTML tag

props.name: gradient
props.description: Applies violet gradient fill to the text

props.name: children
props.description: Text content

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Circular user avatar that renders an image, initials with a violet-hued background, or a fallback icon. Supports status indicators and a group stacking layout via AvatarGroup.

props.name: src
props.description: URL of the avatar image

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text for the image

props.name: name
props.description: Full name used to generate initials and background color when no image is provided

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter of the avatar

props.name: status
props.description: Presence indicator dot overlaid on the avatar

components.name: AvatarGroup
components.description: Stacks multiple Avatar components with overlap and shows a +N overflow count when the list exceeds the max.

props.name: avatars
props.description: Array of avatar prop objects to render

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum number of avatars to show before the overflow count

props.name: size
props.description: Size applied to all avatars in the group

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle control for binary on/off states. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, label, hint text, and three sizes.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state

props.name: defaultChecked
props.description: Initial checked state for uncontrolled usage

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the switch is toggled

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the switch

props.name: size
props.description: Physical size of the toggle track

props.name: label
props.description: Text label rendered beside the switch

props.name: hint
props.description: Helper text below the switch

examples: <Switch size="sm" label="Dark mode" hint="Applies to your account" />

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tab navigation with three visual variants. Supports icons, badge counts, disabled tabs, and controlled/uncontrolled active state. Pair with TabPanel for content panels.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of tab definitions: { id, label, icon?, badge?, disabled? }

props.name: defaultTab
props.description: Initial active tab id for uncontrolled usage

props.name: active
props.description: Controlled active tab id

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the active tab changes

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style of the tab bar

props.name: children
props.description: TabPanel components rendered below the tab bar

examples: <Tabs items={[{ id: 'overview', label: 'Overview' }, { id: 'settings', label: 'Settings' }]} variant="pill" onChange={setTab}><TabPanel id="overview">...</TabPanel></Tabs>

components.name: TabPanel
components.description: Content panel that renders only when its id matches the active tab in a parent Tabs component.

props.name: id
props.description: Must match a TabItem id in the parent Tabs

props.name: children
props.description: Content to display when this panel is active

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Loading indicator in three styles: a spinning ring (SVG arc), a bouncing dots row, and a pulsing circle. Used inline or as a full-area loader.

props.name: variant
props.description: Animation style of the spinner

props.name: size
props.description: Bounding box size of the spinner

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label for screen readers (visually hidden)

components.name: Modal
components.description: Accessible dialog overlay built on the native <dialog> element. Closes on Escape key or backdrop click. Supports title, description, footer actions, and five sizes.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls visibility of the modal

props.name: onClose
props.description: Callback fired when the modal requests to close (Escape or backdrop)

props.name: title
props.description: Modal heading rendered in the header

props.name: description
props.description: Subheading rendered below the title

props.name: footer
props.description: Action buttons rendered in the sticky footer

props.name: size
props.description: Maximum width of the modal panel

props.name: closeOnBackdrop
props.description: Whether clicking the backdrop closes the modal

props.name: children
props.description: Scrollable body content of the modal

examples: <Modal open={isOpen} onClose={close} title="Confirm delete" description="This action cannot be undone." footer={<><Button variant="ghost" onClick={close}>Cancel</Button><Button variant="danger">Delete</Button></>}>Are you sure?</Modal>

components.name: Table
components.description: Full-featured data table with client-side sort, search, and pagination. Supports custom cell renderers, striped rows, density presets, skeleton loading, and an empty state slot.

props.name: columns
props.description: Column definitions: { key, header, renderCell?, sortFn?, sortable?, searchable?, width?, minWidth?, align? }

props.name: data
props.description: Array of row data objects

props.name: rowKey
props.description: Unique key for each row — column key or extractor function

props.name: sortable
props.description: Enables column sort headers

props.name: searchable
props.description: Renders a search bar that filters rows

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the search input

props.name: pageSize
props.description: Enables pagination when set; controls rows per page

props.name: sortKey
props.description: Controlled sort column key

props.name: sortDirection
props.description: Controlled sort direction

props.name: onSortChange
props.description: Callback for controlled sort

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows skeleton rows instead of data

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Custom content shown when data is empty

props.name: striped
props.description: Alternates row background colors

props.name: hoverable
props.description: Highlights rows on hover

props.name: density
props.description: Controls cell padding

props.name: onRowClick
props.description: Callback fired when a row is clicked

examples:
const columns = [{ key: 'name', header: 'Name', sortable: true }, { key: 'status', header: 'Status', renderCell: (v) => <Badge variant="brand">{v}</Badge> }];
<Table columns={columns} data={rows} rowKey="id" sortable searchable pageSize={10} />

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Accessible checkbox with optional label, description, error message, and indeterminate state. Uses React.forwardRef.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text rendered beside the checkbox

props.name: description
props.description: Helper text shown below the label

props.name: error
props.description: Error message that replaces the description

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the checkbox box

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: Renders a dash icon instead of a checkmark

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled checked state

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the checkbox

examples: <Checkbox label="I agree to the terms" checked={agreed} onChange={e => setAgreed(e.target.checked)} />

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: Fieldset container that provides a shared name, value, and onChange context for Radio children. Supports vertical and horizontal layouts.

props.name: name
props.description: HTML name attribute shared by all Radio children

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected value

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when selection changes

props.name: label
props.description: Group legend label rendered above the radios

props.name: error
props.description: Error message rendered below the group

props.name: size
props.description: Size applied to all Radio children

props.name: direction
props.description: Layout direction of the radio options

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all Radio children

props.name: children
props.description: Radio components

examples: <RadioGroup name="plan" value={plan} onChange={setPlan} label="Select plan"><Radio value="free" label="Free" /><Radio value="pro" label="Pro" description="$12/mo" /></RadioGroup>
<RadioGroup name="size" direction="horizontal"><Radio value="sm" label="Small" /><Radio value="lg" label="Large" /></RadioGroup>

components.name: Radio
components.description: Single radio button option, intended to be used inside a RadioGroup. Inherits name, value, onChange, disabled, and size from group context.

props.name: value
props.description: The value this radio represents

props.name: label
props.description: Text label beside the radio

props.name: description
props.description: Helper text below the label

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables this specific radio (overrides group)

props.name: size
props.description: Overrides size from RadioGroup context

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Floating label that appears on hover or focus after a configurable delay. Supports four placement directions and two color variants.

props.name: content
props.description: Text or JSX content shown inside the tooltip

props.name: children
props.description: The trigger element the tooltip is attached to

props.name: placement
props.description: Which side of the trigger the tooltip appears on

props.name: variant
props.description: Color style of the tooltip bubble

props.name: delay
props.description: Milliseconds to wait before showing the tooltip

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevents the tooltip from showing

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Maximum width in pixels of the tooltip bubble

examples: <Tooltip content="Copy to clipboard"><Button variant="ghost" iconLeft={<CopyIcon />} aria-label="Copy" /></Tooltip>

components.name: Divider
components.description: Horizontal or vertical rule that separates content sections. Horizontal dividers support an optional centered, left, or right-aligned text label.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Direction of the divider line

props.name: variant
props.description: Color of the divider line

props.name: label
props.description: Text label rendered inside the horizontal divider line

props.name: labelAlign
props.description: Horizontal alignment of the label

props.name: spacing
props.description: Vertical margin above and below the divider

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Centered placeholder for zero-data views. Accepts an icon, title, description, and one or two action buttons. Includes preset icons via EmptyStateIcons.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary heading of the empty state

props.name: description
props.description: Supporting text below the title

props.name: icon
props.description: Illustration or icon — use EmptyStateIcons presets or a custom SVG

props.name: action
props.description: Primary action button

props.name: secondaryAction
props.description: Secondary action button

props.name: size
props.description: Scale of the icon, text, and padding

props.name: variant
props.description: Color scheme of the icon and title

examples: <EmptyState icon={EmptyStateIcons.inbox} title="No messages" description="When you receive messages, they'll appear here." action={<Button>Compose</Button>} />
<EmptyState icon={EmptyStateIcons.search} title="No results" description="Try a different search term." size="sm" />

components.name: Shimmer
components.description: Animated skeleton placeholder for loading states. Includes ShimmerText, ShimmerAvatar, ShimmerCard, ShimmerTable, and ShimmerList composites.

props.name: width
props.description: CSS width of the shimmer block

props.name: height
props.description: CSS height of the shimmer block in pixels

props.name: radius
props.description: Border radius of the shimmer block

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation panel with collapsible mode. Renders NavItem links or buttons, supports nested child items, icon slots, badge counts, and a footer slot.

props.name: items
props.description: Navigation items: { id, label, href?, icon?, badge?, active?, disabled?, children? }

props.name: logo
props.description: Logo or wordmark rendered at the top of the sidebar

props.name: footer
props.description: Content rendered at the bottom of the sidebar (e.g. user profile)

props.name: collapsed
props.description: When true, collapses the sidebar to icon-only width (64px)

props.name: onItemClick
props.description: Callback fired when a nav item is clicked

components.name: Topbar
components.description: Sticky horizontal header bar with three content zones: left, center, and right. Used as a page-level navigation header.

props.name: left
props.description: Content in the left zone (e.g. logo, breadcrumbs)

props.name: center
props.description: Content in the center zone (e.g. search bar)

props.name: right
props.description: Content in the right zone (e.g. actions, avatar)

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Full-featured date and datetime picker with day, month, and year views. Supports controlled and uncontrolled modes, min/max date bounds, clearable selection, and an optional time picker.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled selected date

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Initial date for uncontrolled usage

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback fired when the selected date changes

props.name: mode
props.description: Whether to include a time picker

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the trigger input

props.name: minDate
props.description: Earliest selectable date

props.name: maxDate
props.description: Latest selectable date

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the date picker

props.name: clearable
props.description: Shows a clear button to deselect the date

props.name: label
props.description: Label rendered above the trigger input

props.name: hint
props.description: Helper text below the input

props.name: error
props.description: Error message below the input

props.name: size
props.description: Height of the trigger input

props.name: showFooter
props.description: Shows Today, Clear, and Apply buttons in the calendar footer

props.name: highlightWeekends
props.description: Renders weekend day numbers in violet
